CREATE TABLE test_array_reduce (id Int32, values Array(Int32), filter_values Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayReduce('sum', values) FROM test_array_reduce WHERE id = 1;
SELECT arrayReduce('maxIf', values, filter_values) FROM test_array_reduce WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, arrayReduce('sum', values) AS total FROM test_array_reduce GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, arrayReduce('maxIf', values, filter_values) AS conditional_max FROM test_array_reduce GROUP BY id;
CREATE TABLE nested_example (group_id Int32, item_values Array(Int32));
SELECT group_id, arrayReduce('max', item_values) AS max_value FROM nested_example;
CREATE TABLE join_example (user_id Int32, orders Array(Int32), statuses Array(String));
SELECT j.user_id, arrayReduce('sum', j.orders) AS total_orders FROM join_example AS j GROUP BY j.user_id HAVING total_orders > 150;
CREATE TABLE complex_query (a Array(Int32), b Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayReduce('sum', a) AS array_a_sum, arrayReduce('max', b) AS array_b_max FROM complex_query WHERE arrayReduce('avg', b) > 3;
WITH (SELECT arrayReduce('uniqUpTo(5)', [5, 10, 10, 15]) AS unique_limit) AS subquery SELECT unique_limit FROM subquery;
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, arrayReduce('sum', values) AS total FROM test_array_reduce GROUP BY id) WHERE total < 10;
